contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.message: We are delighted to hear from you to answer your inquiries or receive your suggestions for improving Quran Apps Directory. You can also join the ITQAN community for Quran technologies to contribute to the development of this project or participate in our other open source initiatives aimed at serving the Holy Quran.

aboutUs.title: About the Comprehensive Quranic Directory
aboutUs.subtitle: The World's Most Complete Guide to the Best Quran Applications
aboutUs.intro: Welcome to the Comprehensive Quranic Directory - the leading platform for discovering and evaluating the finest Islamic applications dedicated to serving the Holy Quran. With over 100 diverse free and premium applications, we're here to facilitate your journey in learning and contemplating the Book of Allah.
aboutUs.missionDescription: The Comprehensive Quranic Directory is an open-source project designed to serve Muslims worldwide by providing a comprehensive and trusted platform for collecting, categorizing, and evaluating digital applications related to the Holy Quran. We strive to facilitate access to the best technological solutions that serve the Book of Allah, whether in recitation, memorization, tafsir, tajweed, or other Quranic fields.
aboutUs.visionDescription: Our vision is to become the world's foremost and most trusted digital resource for Quranic applications, helping millions of Muslims worldwide connect with the Holy Quran and understand and contemplate it through the best modern technological methods.

whatWeDoList.comprehensive: Comprehensive evaluation of over 100 Quranic applications
whatWeDoList.categories: Expert categorization by field (Mushaf, Tafsir, Recitation, Memorization)
whatWeDoList.quality: Rigorous quality testing to ensure reliability
whatWeDoList.community: Active community of developers and users

whyList.largest: The largest collection of Quranic applications in one place
whyList.verified: All applications are tested and verified by specialists
whyList.expert: Professional evaluations from experts in Quranic technology
whyList.updated: Continuous updates and addition of new applications
whyList.free: Completely free service with no advertisements

aboutUs.categoriesDescription: We provide diverse applications across all fields of Quranic studies and Islamic sciences:

values_list.accuracyAndAuthenticity: Accuracy and reliability in Quranic content
values_list.userCentricDesignAndAccessibility: User-centered design and ease of access
values_list.continuousImprovementAndInnovation: Continuous improvement and innovation in service
values_list.communityEngagementAndSupport: Building a strong community and mutual support

aboutUs.acknowledgementsText: We thank all developers and creators who dedicate their efforts to serving the Holy Quran through technology. We especially thank our colleagues in the Islamic Applications project for sharing with us the initial list of applications.

ramadan.title: Ramadan 1447
ramadan.tagline: With the Quran.. A Closer Companion
ramadan.description: In Ramadan we seek companionship, and the Quran creates for us a bond of believers' hearts. In this guide we curated diverse Quran apps suited for Ramadan to create a beautiful new companionship in this blessed month.

sectionSubtitle.quran: Apps to help you read and listen to the Quran
sectionSubtitle.translations: Apps providing Quran translations in various languages
sectionSubtitle.family: Quran apps that bring the family together in Ramadan
sectionSubtitle.ai: Apps using AI to serve the Quran

sectionDesc.quran: The Quran holds a daily presence in our lives during Ramadan, with diverse patterns of reading, listening, and reflection. This collection features apps that help you read and listen to the Quran in different ways suited to the rhythm of the month.
sectionDesc.translations: The impact of the Quran extends to hearts that speak different languages. This collection brings together apps that provide Quran translations and contemplation in ways that bridge the gap between Muslims worldwide.
sectionDesc.family: The Quran holds a daily presence in our lives during Ramadan, with diverse patterns of reading, listening, and reflection. This collection features apps that help you and your family engage with the Quran together during the blessed month.
sectionDesc.ai: Apps that use artificial intelligence technologies to enhance the experience of reading, reflecting, and learning from the Holy Quran in innovative and smart ways.
sectionDesc.accessibility: Access to the Quran is a right available to all. This collection includes apps designed to meet the needs of those with visual or hearing impairments, providing accessible experiences for engaging with the Quranic text.

footer.title: Ramadan is an Opportunity to Share
footer.description: The Living Quran Project - we explore ways to serve the Quran and share its message, delivering apps, ideas, and projects to as many people as possible.
footer.openSource: An open source project by ITQAN Community
